{"query":"Zelenskyy Starmer Kyiv July 2026 UK 300 million Sweden Ukraine 16 advanced aircraft agreement model aircraft details announcement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1702,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://newsukraine.rbc.ua/news/uk-and-sweden-to-provide-funding-for-16-fighter-1784208314.html","title":"UK and Sweden to provide funding for 16 fighter jets for Ukraine | RBC-Ukraine","content":"UK and Sweden to provide funding for 16 fighter jets for Ukraine
The United Kingdom and Sweden are allocating £300 million (about $400 million) to purchase modern aircraft for Ukraine, British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced during a joint press conference with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy in Kyiv.
Starmer announced €300 million in support for the delivery of 16 aircraft that will help protect Ukrainian skies from Russian attacks.
According to Starmer, the United Kingdom is providing this assistance in cooperation with Sweden.
Ukraine and Sweden are preparing to sign contracts for the supply of Saab JAS 39 Gripen fighter jets.","date":"1 day ago"},{"url":"https://english.nv.ua/nation/uk-to-fund-15-aircraft-for-ukraine-under-300m-joint-project-50624918.html","title":"UK to fund 15 aircraft for Ukraine under £300M joint project / The New Voice of Ukraine","content":"1 day ago — Britain will provide £300 million for a joint project with Sweden to deliver 15 aircraft to Ukraine, Starmer says.
British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said that the U.K. will allocate £300 million to a joint project with Sweden to provide Ukraine with 15 new aircraft to strengthen the country's air defenses, speaking alongside President Volodymyr Zelenskyy in Kyiv on July 16.
Britain has also joined the European Union's €90 billion loan program to support Ukraine in 2026-2027.
On July 13, Starmer said that after a ceasefire takes effect, 25 countries would be prepared to deploy troops to Ukraine as part of peace guarantees.
On July 10, Bloomberg reported that the European Union planned to allow Ukraine to purchase British weapons using a separate €60 billion defense loan provided by the bloc.
For the past five years, The New Voice of Ukraine has been working tirelessly to push back against Russian narratives and defend democracy."},{"url":"https://www.kyivpost.com/post/80423","title":"UK to Provide £300M for Ukraine in Joint Initiative With Sweden","content":"1 day ago — The UK will provide £300 million ($405 million) to support a joint initiative with Sweden aimed at delivering 15 modern aircraft to Ukraine, ...Read more
The announcement came during British Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s visit to Kyiv, where he also called for increased pressure on Russia.
During a joint press conference with President Volodymyr Zelensky in Kyiv, Starmer presented the initiative as part of continued efforts to strengthen Ukraine’s air defenses amid ongoing Russian missile and drone attacks, Ukrinform reported Thursday.
“I am pleased to inform you that today we are going further, because I can announce that the UK is providing £300 million in support to work with Sweden to provide 15 new modern aircraft to help protect Ukraine’s sky,” Starmer said.
According to Starmer, Russian President Vladimir Putin has been forced to acknowledge that the invasion of Ukraine is creating problems at home.
US President Donald Trump has changed his attitude toward Ukraine, signaling stronger support after intelligence briefings left him deeply impressed by Kyiv’s long-range strikes deep into the Russia."},{"url":"https://news.cgtn.com/news/2026-07-16/news-1OPuFoBBGpy/share_amp.html","title":"UK PM STARMER: UK WILL PROVIDE 300 MILLION ...","date":"2 days ago","content":"2 days ago — UK PM STARMER: UK WILL PROVIDE 300 MILLION EUROS OF SUPPORT, WORKING WITH SWEDEN, TO PROVIDE 16 ADVANCED AIRCRAFT TO HELP DEFEND UKRAINE.Read more"}]}
